content:
Anthropic emerged when scaling language models made **alignment and deployment risk** urgent engineering problems, not distant philosophy. Founders sought an institution that could publish safety research **and** ship competitive models—avoiding a pure-academia vs pure-product split.

**Constitutional AI** (2022) became a signature predecessor technique: using principles and critique loops to improve behavior without relying solely on human labels for every edge case. That research lineage directly informs how Claude models are trained and updated.

Consumer **chat** products industry-wide (2022–2023) accelerated demand for steerable assistants; Anthropic's response was **Claude**—first via controlled API access, then claude.ai—embedding safety work into a product users could touch.

timeline.description: Anthropic founded as a public-benefit AI company emphasizing safety.
Constitutional AI paper and public safety writing clarify technical direction.
Broader Claude API and claude.ai adoption; model tier branding matures.
Expanded developer tools, multimodal features, cloud distribution, and agent platforms (see later roadmap stages).
